title: AI Phishing Ingestion & Triage Platform
description: A full-scale automated phishing investigation platform that integrates AI-based mail classification, multi-engine IOC enrichment, SOP validation checkbooks, and automated verdict outputs. Fully eliminates manual triage for standard alerts.
features: Reduces triage workload by automated verdict categorization
Performs real-time headers, attachments, and URLs inspections
Logs incident metrics directly to centralized dashboards

title: Fine-Tuned In-House SOC LLM
description: Co-architected and productionized an in-house Large Language Model fine-tuned on historical SOC alert data and security runbooks. Integrated as a helper bot for L1 analysts to decrease MTTR by 30-40%.
features: Offline deployment ensuring zero client-data exposure
Auto-generates draft alert summaries and containment suggestions
Trained on categorized network logs and security incident alerts
Integrates with local enterprise database instances securely

title: Adversarial LLaMA 2 Jailbreaker
description: A jailbroken LLaMA 2 (7B) model fine-tuned for red-teaming and offensive threat modeling. Auto-generates adversarial prompts to test application security and design robust detection rules.
features: Generates mock phishing payloads and exploit patterns
Adversarial prompt generation to test LLM security guardrails
Directly sharpens detection engineer hypothesis generation
Fully sandboxed locally to prevent misuse

title: Incident Enrichment Automation Suite
description: A collection of custom Python scripts designed during Deloitte USI tenure that automates alert triage, cutting investigation times from 20+ minutes to under 3 minutes.
features: Automated IP, Domain, and File Hash reputation lookup queries
Alert correlation rule sets identifying Okta credential abuse
Automated ticket escalation to L2 handlers
Cleans and parses raw log outputs dynamically
